_comment: Version manifest for the update reminders. The App fetches this raw file (same idea as ops/status.json): edit + commit + push to main and every App picks it up on its next fetch — no store release, no relay redeploy. The relay's GET /v1/versions is only a fallback for clients that cannot reach GitHub.

_fields.latest: newest published build — the App shows a dismissible 'update available' hint when the running plugin/app is older
_fields.min: oldest build that still works with the current contracts. BELOW IT THE APP BLOCKS (plugin: red warning only, never blocks generation). This is the fuse for a breaking contract change — leave it at 0.0.0 in normal times
_fields.url: where to get the update. Empty string = no link (the App only informs, no jump button)
